headline: Snapdocs and BNY To Launch Automated Collateral Delivery and eCustody Solution
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, May 14, 2026--Snapdocs, the leading digital closing platform for the U.S. mortgage industry, today announced an initiative with BNY (NYSE: BK), a global financial services platforms company, to deliver automated, end-to-end digital mortgage collateral infrastructure.

headline: Is Wall Street Bullish or Bearish on Bank of New York Mellon Stock?
summary: The Bank of New York Mellon has outperformed the broader market over the past year, with analysts maintaining a generally bullish outlook on the company’s long-term growth prospects.
